The Mendix Deploy API manages apps, environments, deployment packages,
transports, logs, scaling, settings, and tags on Mendix Cloud. Authentication
uses the Mendix-Username and Mendix-ApiKey request headers tied to a Mendix
user account.


Contact Support:
 Name: Mendix
